user_story: Discover Polymarket markets enrolled in the liquidity-rewards program. The user wants to see what reward-eligible markets are available before considering deploying capital. The first discovery tool (find_reward_markets) only hits public Gamma + CLOB endpoints, but downstream signing/submit tools require a wallet and POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY which is NOT provided in this run — so we accept either a clean discovery result or a structured 'missing credentials' failure as a successful proof the harness handles auth-blocked long-tail apps.

turns.prompt: Show me the top Polymarket markets enrolled in the liquidity-rewards program right now. I just want to see what's available — don't deploy anything yet.
